item.title: US Treasury secretary hints at lifting more Russian oil sanctions amid price surges following Mid-East war
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
The development comes after oil tanker traffic through the Strait of Hormuz has virtually halted.
Matched: war(+3), sanctions(+2), ai(+3)

item.title: Malaysia PM Anwar, police chief sued over calling out alleged plot to topple government
item.description:
Source: Channel NewsAsia (Global)
The family of Daim Zainuddin, an influential two-time finance minister who died in November 2024, said in a statement it was "public knowledge" that the investigation targeted Daim's widow Na'imah Abdul Khalid and their sons.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3), who(+2)

item.title: Anthropic vows court fight in Pentagon row
item.description:
Source: Channel NewsAsia (Global)
Anthropic chief executive Dario Amodei has said the company has "no choice" but to challenge in court the Pentagon's formal designation of the artificial intelligence firm as a risk to US national security.
Matched: court(+2), ai(+3), artificial intelligence(+3)

item.title: ‘They knew they were next on the list’: Hezbollah spent months re-arming ahead of another Israel war
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
To do so, it had drawn on a monthly budget of US$50 million, most of it from Iran.
Matched: budget(+3), war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Iran war is latest threat to a global economy rattled by Trump
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
Rising energy prices threaten to stoke inflation and hobble economic growth in countries around the world.
Matched: war(+3), inflation(+2), economy(+2)

item.title: Trump to forge ahead with immigration crackdown driven by top aide Stephen Miller
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
WASHINGTON, March 6 - U.S. President Donald Trump is expected to forge ahead with his aggressive immigration crackdown driven by top aide Stephen Miller and a new homeland secretary nominee who shares Trump's hardline view, current and former U.S. officials and lawmakers said.
Matched: law(+3), ai(+3), who(+2)

item.title: Questions over AI capability as tech guides Iran strikes
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
AI’s deployment in war poses a slew of moral and legal questions.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Iran war enters second week as Trump demands 'unconditional surrender'
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
BEIRUT/WASHINGTON/JERUSALEM, March 7 - The expanding war in Iran entered its second week on Saturday amid renewed uncertainty about how or when hostilities will end, as U.S. President Donald Trump declared he would only accept Tehran's \"unconditional surrender\" and Israel traded fresh attacks with Iran and Lebanon.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: US 'not concerned' by reports Russia aiding Iran's targeting
item.description:
Source: Channel NewsAsia (Global)
The Washington Post, citing officials familiar with the intelligence, said Russia has provided Iran with the locations of US military assets, including ships and aircraft.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: US suspects China in breach of FBI surveillance network, WSJ reports
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
The FBI described the hackers’ techniques as “sophisticated”.
Matched: ai(+3), breach(+3)

item.title: US pump prices surge as Iran war upends global energy supply
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
Fuel prices in the US jumped more than 10 per cent since the US-Israel war on Iran started.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Britain 'ready to support' Saudi defence: PM Starmer
item.description:
Source: Channel NewsAsia (Global)
Saudi Arabia - a longstanding rival of Iran - reported that it had intercepted a cruise missile and three drones on Friday.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Qatar aviation authority allowing limited air traffic
item.description:
Source: Channel NewsAsia (Global)
Qatar Airways said following the confirmation of a safe corridor that it would operate repatriation flights on Mar 7 to London, Paris, Madrid, Rome and Frankfurt.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Binance, Zhao win dismissal of lawsuit by victims of 64 attacks
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
Binance was accused as being liable for transactions that allegedly funded terrorist attacks.
Matched: law(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Trump says US defence firms to quadruple output of some weapons
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
The move comes amid worries that the war against Iran is depleting the Pentagon’s stockpiles.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Iran’s UN envoy says 1,332 Iranian civilians killed in war
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
He accused the US and Israel of targeting civilian infrastructure, while claiming Iran had done the opposite.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Between cooking impressive dishes, Culinary Class Wars chefs ate instant cup noodles, Jung Ho-young reveals
item.description:
Source: Channel NewsAsia (Global)
In Singapore for a collaboration with Korean restaurant Bulgogi Syo, the chef and popular TV personality spilled some beans about what it was really like behind the scenes of the reality cooking competition show – and also why he likes laksa and kaya toast, but not so much oyster omelette.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Qatar partially reopens airspace as Iranian strikes continue to hit Gulf
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
Evacuation and cargo flights to resume but scheduled services still suspended as US-Israeli war on Iran continues.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Why did the US torpedo Iran’s ‘prize’ warship?
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
Why did the US sink Iran's prize destroyer, the IRIS Dena? Soraya Lennie explains.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: US judge dismisses case by deported student who declined flight back
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
BOSTON, March 6 - A U.S. judge who had ordered President Donald Trump's administration to facilitate the return of a college student it deported to Honduras said on Friday the \"sad truth\" is that her decision not to board a plane it arranged back to the United States meant her case must be dismissed.
Matched: ai(+3), who(+2)

item.title: Croatia to re-launch mandatory military service after 17 years
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
KARLOVAC, Croatia March 6 - Croatia is set to resume mandatory military service for the first time in 17 years as part of the European Union member's broader strategy to address security concerns in Europe and the Western Balkans.
Matched: ai(+3), launch(+2)

item.title: US and Israel attacking Iran at ‘record pace’, war monitor says
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
Airwars says first days of US-Israeli Iran strikes 'hit significantly more targets than any campaign in recent decades'.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Germany's Merz warns against spread of war in Middle East
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
MUNICH, March 6 - German Chancellor Friedrich Merz said on Friday Berlin was working with partners to find an approach to end the fighting with Iran as he warned against allowing the country to fall into chaos as the war widens across the Middle East.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: White House says US well on way towards controlling Iran’s airspace
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
Washington says it expects achievable US objectives to be completed in four to six weeks.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)
